message:
fix(e2e): ensure workspace copies of golden DBs are writable

Golden fixture files may be read-only, but the e2e harness needs to
write to workspace copies. Add ensure_writable() to set the user-write
permission bit after copying DB and sidecar files. Includes a test
that marks golden files read-only and verifies copies are writable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
